message:
test(speculation,streaming): massive edge-case test expansion for speculative pipeline

speculation.rs (+4024 lines):
- CalibrationTracker: Brier score computation with uniform predictions,
  single-element window, eviction behavior, known Brier score values
- CorrectionTracker: corrections slice bounds, max_observed_wer tracking
- SpeculationWindowController: evidence recording, action field validation
- BetaPosterior: validation rejects infinite alpha
- WindowManager merge tests: dominated lower-confidence segments correctly
  preserve existing data
- ~3900+ lines of comprehensive edge-case coverage ensuring numerical
  stability and correctness of the speculative decoding pipeline

streaming.rs (+709 lines):
- SpeculativeStreamingPipeline: event message content, single-window
  duration bounds, stats payload run_id, adaptive=false mode, event
  stage lifecycle, retract/correct event payloads, single-segment
  whitespace handling
- Tests verify the full streaming lifecycle from segment arrival through
  speculative output to correction/retraction

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
